abandoned_or_draft_flows.notes: Original renewal attempt, never activated. Superseded by Renewal_Opportunity_2_No_Products.
v12 obsolete. Description: 'This version excludes the V1 product logic, to expedite go live on this automation.' Superseded by Renewal_Opportunity_2_No_Products.
Second attempt at 3-year contract handling. Abandoned in draft.

key_observations: There are 8 bespoke active flows (not 1). Brayden only flagged 1. 7 need investigation.
The known renewal flow has a DRAFT v5 dated 2026-01-22 attempting to add product lines. Not activated. Either WIP or abandoned.
Multiple abandoned renewal-flow experiments (Renewal_Opportunity, Renewal_Opportunity_No_Products, 2 testing variants) indicate iteration pain. The current one is the 3rd+ attempt.
Two abandoned 'Three Year Contract' flow experiments suggest someone wanted multi-year contract handling but never shipped it. Worth asking Brayden if still needed.
Pardot (Account Engagement) flows are package-owned - leave as-is when sunsetting.
Essentials Email/Social Processing flows have never been touched since 2020 org creation - safe to treat as inactive.
